headline: Sanmina Surges 201% in the Past Year: Reason to Bet on the Stock?
summary: SANM's 200.5% surge leans on vertical integration, 42Q connected manufacturing and the ZT Systems deal.

headline: Flex Upgrades AI Portfolio: Can it Capitalize on the Data Center Boom?
summary: Flex unveiled AI data center power solutions at COMPUTEX 2026, including a 110 kW shelf for NVIDIA Vera Rubin systems and new power-management tech.

headline: JABIL INC (NYSE:JBL): A GARP Stock Combining Strong Growth and Reasonable Valuation
summary: Jabil (JBL) offers strong earnings momentum with 39.98% EPS growth and reasonable valuations, featuring a solid profitability rating of 8/10, making it a prime GARP stock candidate.
